source_jobs.title: Senior Platform Engineer (AWS) (all genders)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At GotPhoto, we are freeing photographers to be more successful.

Through our platforms GotPhoto.com http://GotPhoto.com and fotograf.de http://fotograf.de, we help professional photographers simplify and transform the way they work — from photo management and client communication to ordering and payment processing. Our end-to-end workflow and e-commerce solution gives photographers more time to focus on what matters most: being behind the lens.

Since 2012, we’ve built a sustainable and profitable business driven by entrepreneurial spirit, innovation, and a deep understanding of photographers’ everyday challenges. Today, thousands of photographers trust our software , creating their own success stories https://gotphoto.com/success-stories/ along the way.

As the leading e-commerce engine for professional volume photographers and a business backed by EQT, one of the world’s leading private equity firms, we’re powered by a team of 150+ talented and international people building technology that simplifies photographers’ everyday work and helps them focus on capturing meaningful moments.

Join us on our journey to empower photographers like never before.




YOUR ROLE

Do you want to build the platform that helps engineering teams move faster, ship safer, and scale smarter?

You'll work at the intersection of Platform Engineering, SRE, Developer Experience, and AI Enablement—building the infrastructure, tooling, and guardrails that power a global SaaS platform.




WHAT YOU'LL DO




BUILD AND EVOLVE OUR PLATFORM

 - Design, build, and operate the cloud-native platform that supports our engineering organization.

 - Create reusable platform services, self-service capabilities, and infrastructure standards that help product teams deliver software faster and more reliably.


ELEVATE DEVELOPER EXPERIENCE

 - Reduce friction across the software development lifecycle.

 - Build and improve CI/CD pipelines, internal tooling, automation, and developer workflows that increase productivity and accelerate delivery.

 - Partner with engineering teams to continuously improve the developer experience.


DRIVE RELIABILITY & OBSERVABILITY

 - Improve the reliability and performance of our systems.

 - Define and maintain SLAs, SLOs, and observability standards using metrics, logs, tracing, and monitoring.

 - Support incident response, root-cause analysis, and continuous platform improvements.


ENABLE AI-NATIVE ENGINEERING

 - Help shape the next generation of developer platforms.

 - Build infrastructure and workflows that support:
   
   - AI coding assistants such as GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and future AI development tools
   
   - Agentic AI infrastructure including MCP servers, tool-calling backends, and secure execution environments
   
   - AI workload observability including LLM tracing, latency, usage, and cost monitoring
   
   - Safe AI deployment workflows with model versioning, experimentation, rollbacks, and policy-driven guardrails


CHAMPION SECURITY & PLATFORM EXCELLENCE

 - Embed security, compliance, and Infrastructure-as-Code best practices into engineering workflows.

 - Design scalable AWS architectures and automation that keep our platform secure, reliable, and ready for growth.


LEAD THROUGH INFLUENCE

 - Share knowledge, mentor engineers, and drive cross-functional platform initiatives.

 - Help establish engineering best practices and foster a culture of continuous improvement.




WHAT YOU BRING




EXPERIENCE

 - 5+ years in Platform Engineering, SRE, Developer Experience, or a similar field

 - Experience building and operating production systems in AWS

 - Strong Infrastructure-as-Code and automation background


TECHNICAL SKILLS

 - Cloud & Platform Technologies: You are experienced with AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, Helm, and modern cloud-native infrastructure patterns.

 - Observability & Reliability: You know how to design systems that are observable, measurable, and resilient using tools such as OpenT

source_jobs.title: Head of Accounting (all genders)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At GotPhoto, we are freeing photographers to be more successful.

Through our platforms GotPhoto.com http://GotPhoto.com and fotograf.de http://fotograf.de, we help professional photographers simplify and transform the way they work — from photo management and client communication to ordering and payment processing. Our end-to-end workflow and e-commerce solution gives photographers more time to focus on what matters most: being behind the lens.

Since 2012, we’ve built a sustainable and profitable business driven by entrepreneurial spirit, innovation, and a deep understanding of photographers’ everyday challenges. Today, thousands of photographers trust our software , creating their own success stories https://gotphoto.com/success-stories/ along the way.

As the leading e-commerce engine for professional volume photographers and a business backed by EQT, one of the world’s leading private equity firms, we’re powered by a team of 150+ talented and international people building technology that simplifies photographers’ everyday work and helps them focus on capturing meaningful moments.

Join us on our journey to empower photographers like never before.




YOUR ROLE

Do you want to transform a global accounting function from manual complexity into a scalable, automation-first operation?

Are you ready to take ownership of multi-entity accounting across Germany, the US, and Canada while building the financial infrastructure that powers our next stage of growth?

...then you are our perfect match!

Prepare for a steep learning curve as you step into a highly visible leadership role where your impact extends far beyond traditional accounting. You will partner closely with the CFO to shape our accounting strategy, modernize our finance technology stack, and drive AI-powered automation initiatives that redefine how finance operates across the business.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Shape Our Accounting Strategy & Lead the Function: Shape the future of our global accounting function by partnering with the CFO to build scalable processes, elevate financial excellence, and develop a high-performing team that enables sustainable growth.

 - Build the Finance Function of the Future: Turn accounting into a technology-driven competitive advantage by designing scalable processes, implementing AI-powered automation, and building a finance ecosystem that scales with our global growth.

 - Own Multi-Entity Accounting & Group Consolidation: Ensure complete financial visibility across our global business by leading multi-entity accounting, delivering accurate and timely reporting, and maintaining best-in-class accounting standards across all jurisdictions.

 - Lead Tax, Compliance & Audit Readiness: Build confidence in our global financial operations by driving tax and compliance excellence, leading successful audits, and ensuring we remain ahead of regulatory requirements across every market we operate in.




WHAT YOU'LL BRING




EXPERIENCE

 - Accounting Leadership: You bring 8+ years of progressive accounting experience, including at least 3 years leading and developing accounting teams.

 - Automation & Transformation: You have a proven track record of modernizing accounting functions through process optimization, automation, and technology adoption.

 - Multi-Entity Expertise: You have extensive experience managing accounting operations across multiple legal entities, including group consolidation and intercompany accounting.

 - Audit & Compliance Excellence: You have successfully led annual statutory audits across multiple jurisdictions and maintain a strong understanding of financial controls and compliance requirements.

 - Tax Knowledge: You bring hands-on experience with German tax requirements and have worked with tax structures and compliance obligations across the US and/or Canada.


SKILLS

 - Strategic Finance Leadership: You can define a long-term accounting vision and translate it into an executable roadmap with measurable

source_jobs.title: Office & Team Assistant (all genders) - Part-Time
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At GotPhoto, we are freeing photographers to be more successful.

Through our platforms GotPhoto.com http://GotPhoto.com and fotograf.de http://fotograf.de, we help professional photographers simplify and transform the way they work — from photo management and client communication to ordering and payment processing. Our end-to-end workflow and e-commerce solution gives photographers more time to focus on what matters most: being behind the lens.

Since 2012, we’ve built a sustainable and profitable business driven by entrepreneurial spirit, innovation, and a deep understanding of photographers’ everyday challenges. Today, thousands of photographers trust our software , creating their own success stories https://gotphoto.com/success-stories/ along the way.

As the leading e-commerce engine for professional volume photographers and a business backed by EQT, one of the world’s leading private equity firms, we’re powered by a team of 150+ talented and international people building technology that simplifies photographers’ everyday work and helps them focus on capturing meaningful moments.

Join us on our journey to empower photographers like never before.



Do you love bringing structure to chaos and keeping things running smoothly? Are you looking for a part-time role where you can split your talents between shaping a welcoming office environment and acting as a trusted right hand to our CEO-office?

At GotPhoto, we are transforming a highly manual industry—Volume Photography—into a seamless digital experience. As our Office & Team Assistant, you act as an operational self-starter who loves variety: from ensuring our physical space looks pristine and managing our product returns process, to keeping our CEO-office's calendar and team perfectly organized. If you are proactive, deeply structured, and love a hands-on environment where your work has a daily visible impact, let’s talk!

What You Will Do

 - Champion our Office Environment: Take absolute ownership of the morning look and feel of our Berlin workspace; manage physical tidiness, keep standard office areas organized.

 - Streamline the Returns Lifecycle: Manage the daily incoming logistics and inventory for package returns, ensuring items are processed, tracked via Excel, and organized within a tight daily window.

 - Empower our CEO-office: Act as the strategic time manager for our CEO-office; proactively handle calendar scheduling, coordinate travel itineraries, and shield them from scheduling conflicts or double-bookings.

 - Build a Vibrant Workplace Culture: Partner closely with the People Team to create an organized, positive atmosphere where employees and visitors love to spend their time.

What You Bring

Experience

 - The Operational Core: You have a background in Office Management, Team Assistance, or a deeply customer-centric environment such as a premium hotel reception or hospitality desk.

 - Fast-Paced Fluency: You have previously worked in environments that required handling physical tasks alongside digital coordination seamlessly.

 - SaaS or Tech Exposure: Experience working in a dynamic, international startup or scale-up ecosystem is a plus.

Skills

 - Tool Proficiency: You are fully literate in Google Workspace (especially Google Calendar) and comfortable managing spreadsheets in Microsoft Excel.

 - Flawless Communication: You possess strong, clear verbal and written communication skills in English and German.

 - Organizational Brilliance: You know how to prioritize incoming tasks dynamically, keeping logistical data organized while simultaneously managing executive travel requests.

Mindset

 - Hands-on & Proactive: You don't wait for a manual; you see what needs to be fixed, tidied, or adjusted and you take immediate care of it.

 - Deeply Autonomous: You enjoy having ownership over your domain, working independently to hit daily operational goals.

 - High Trust & Discretion: You possess the professional maturity and discretion required

source_jobs.title: Senior Data Analyst (AI-Enabled Analytics) (all genders)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At GotPhoto, we are freeing photographers to be more successful.

Through our platforms GotPhoto.com http://GotPhoto.com and fotograf.de http://fotograf.de, we help professional photographers simplify and transform the way they work — from photo management and client communication to ordering and payment processing. Our end-to-end workflow and e-commerce solution gives photographers more time to focus on what matters most: being behind the lens.

Since 2012, we’ve built a sustainable and profitable business driven by entrepreneurial spirit, innovation, and a deep understanding of photographers’ everyday challenges. Today, thousands of photographers trust our software , creating their own success stories https://gotphoto.com/success-stories/ along the way.

As the leading e-commerce engine for professional volume photographers and a business backed by EQT, one of the world’s leading private equity firms, we’re powered by a team of 150+ talented and international people building technology that simplifies photographers’ everyday work and helps them focus on capturing meaningful moments.

Join us on our journey to empower photographers like never before.




YOUR ROLE

Do you want to move beyond the world of treating data teams like report factories? Are you ready to step into the future of analytics, acting as a true business logic architect who designs the semantic foundation for both humans and advanced AI data agents? If this sounds like you, then you're the perfect match for us.

We have already deployed our own in-house AI analytics agent to handle rapid self-serve questions. Now, we need a brilliant, commercially aware Senior Data Analyst to partner with our CEO Office and Customer Operations teams to own the underlying business context, standardize core metrics, and build the source-of-truth frameworks that power our next chapter of growth.

What You’ll Do

 - Act as a Business Logic Architect: Partner directly with the CEO Office and Customer Operations leaders across our US and DACH markets. Extract tribal business rules from spreadsheets and Slack threads, transforming them into clearly defined, standardized metrics and documentation.

 - Own Source-of-Truth Products: Design, build, and maintain foundational dashboards in Metabase that serve as the ultimate operating rhythm for leadership. Ensure every asset you publish is treated like a robust product—comprehensive, reusable, and clearly highlighting any logical caveats.

 - Fuel AI-Driven Analytics: Enrich the semantic context and reliability of GotPhoto’s in-house AI analytics agent. Translate domain rules and metric definitions into structured assets so the agent can accurately execute self-serve analysis without spreading misaligned insights.

 - Raise the BI Chapter Bar: Serve as a senior technical beacon within the BI chapter. Mentor peer analysts, champion analytical rigor, and systematically turn repetitive ad-hoc ticket spikes into scalable, automated self-serve models.

 - Bridge the Data Ecosystem: Work collaboratively with the BI Chapter and the Data Platform team, translating complex business logic into clean structural requirements for upstream Snowflake performance and data engineering dependencies.

What You’ll Bring

Experience

 - The Strategic Track Record: 5+ years of professional experience in data analytics, with a significant portion spent navigating the fast-paced realities of B2B SaaS, transactional E-Commerce, or global Marketplaces.

 - Executive Partnership: Proven experience working directly alongside senior leadership or C-level stakeholders, demonstrating the professional maturity needed to challenge assumptions and drive cross-functional metric consensus.

Skills

 - Snowflake & SQL Mastery: Advanced, production-grade SQL skills with deep experience optimizing queries and structuring data logic natively within Snowflake.

 - Data Product Architecture: Strong understanding of dimensional modeling principles and modern BI tools

source_jobs.title: Data Platform Lead (all genders)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At GotPhoto, we are freeing photographers to be more successful.

Through our platforms GotPhoto.com http://GotPhoto.com and fotograf.de http://fotograf.de, we help professional photographers simplify and transform the way they work — from photo management and client communication to ordering and payment processing. Our end-to-end workflow and e-commerce solution gives photographers more time to focus on what matters most: being behind the lens.

Since 2012, we’ve built a sustainable and profitable business driven by entrepreneurial spirit, innovation, and a deep understanding of photographers’ everyday challenges. Today, thousands of photographers trust our software , creating their own success stories https://gotphoto.com/success-stories/ along the way.

As the leading e-commerce engine for professional volume photographers and a business backed by EQT, one of the world’s leading private equity firms, we’re powered by a team of 150+ talented and international people building technology that simplifies photographers’ everyday work and helps them focus on capturing meaningful moments.

Join us on our journey to empower photographers like never before.




YOUR ROLE:

Do you want to drive high-impact data initiatives alongside an international data team and play a key role in scaling a market-leading e-commerce workflow platform? If you thrive on a steep technical learning curve, possess a high level of ownership, and want to build modern, reusable data systems that empower human decision making, self-serve analytics, and AI agents, you are our perfect match!




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Shape Platform Strategy & Architecture

 - Pioneer Agentic AI & Analytics Innovation

 - Modernize Pipelines & Event Streaming: Build, optimize, and manage highly resilient ETL/ELT pipelines using Snowflake, dbt, Airbyte, and Airflow. You will design modern ingestion and transformation architectures while enabling near-real-time event streaming capabilities through Kafka and similar technologies.

 - Automate Workflows & Operational Processes: Leverage orchestration and automation platforms such as n8n to connect systems, streamline business operations, eliminate repetitive manual work, and enable scalable workflow automation across teams.

 - Establish AI-Ready Data Foundations: Ensure all data products are discoverable, well-documented, governed, and trusted across the organization. You will establish strong data contracts, ownership models, observability standards, and governance practices so both humans and AI-powered systems can confidently work with data.

 - Leverage Cloud & DevOps Infrastructure: Deploy and manage cloud-native data infrastructure on AWS while working with Infrastructure-as-Code and containerized environments using Terraform, Kubernetes, and GitLab CI/CD pipelines.

 - Empower & Mentor a Skilled Team: Provide dedicated technical leadership and hands-on mentorship to two data engineers. You will establish engineering standards, scalable operational practices, testing structures, and a strong culture of collaboration and technical excellence.




WHAT YOU BRING




EXPERIENCE

 - Proven Data Engineering Foundation: 5+ years of experience in data engineering or technical leadership, with strong expertise in SQL, Python, ETL/ELT, data modeling, and scalable data architectures.

 - Modern Platform & Architecture Experience: Proven experience designing scalable data platforms and migrating legacy systems toward modular or event-driven architectures.

 - Cross-Functional Communication: Strong experience collaborating with cross-functional stakeholders to align technical architecture with business goals.


SKILLS

 - The Modern Data Stack: Hands-on expertise with Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, and Airbyte, plus experience with event-streaming technologies such as Kafka.

 - Advanced Coding & DevOps: Strong Python skills and experience with AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes, GitLab CI/CD, and cloud-native infrastructure.

 - Automation

source_jobs.title: Head Of Customer Success & Growth US & Canada (all genders)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At GotPhoto, we are freeing photographers to be more successful.

Through our platforms GotPhoto.com http://GotPhoto.com and fotograf.de http://fotograf.de, we help professional photographers simplify and transform the way they work — from photo management and client communication to ordering and payment processing. Our end-to-end workflow and e-commerce solution gives photographers more time to focus on what matters most: being behind the lens.

Since 2012, we’ve built a sustainable and profitable business driven by entrepreneurial spirit, innovation, and a deep understanding of photographers’ everyday challenges. Today, thousands of photographers trust our software , creating their own success stories https://gotphoto.com/success-stories/ along the way.

As the leading e-commerce engine for professional volume photographers and a business backed by EQT, one of the world’s leading private equity firms, we’re powered by a team of 150+ talented and international people building technology that simplifies photographers’ everyday work and helps them focus on capturing meaningful moments.

Join us on our journey to empower photographers like never before.




THE ROLE

﻿


YOUR MISSION

GotPhoto is seeking a Head of Customer Success to a team responsible for customer retention, expansion, and long-term customer growth across our Enterprise and Scale-Up segments.

This is a senior leadership role responsible for defining and executing the Customer Success strategy with Net Revenue Retention (NRR) as the north star. You will lead a high-performing team focused on driving adoption, expansion, and executive-level customer partnerships while building scalable processes that accelerate growth.

You will partner closely with Sales, Product, Marketing, and Leadership to ensure customers achieve measurable business outcomes and maximize the value of the GotPhoto platform.


﻿


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own Net Revenue Retention (NRR), driving customer retention, expansion, and long-term revenue growth.

 - Lead and develop a high-performing Customer Success organization with clear performance accountability.

 - Drive GMV growth through strategic account planning, executive engagement, and value-based customer partnerships.

 - Ensure renewal success by proactively managing risk, adoption, and customer health.

 - Establish scalable Customer Success processes, playbooks, and operating rhythms to support growth.

 - Use customer insights and data to inform strategy, forecasting, and cross-functional decision-making.

 - Partner with Sales, Product, and Marketing to align customer lifecycle strategy and improve customer outcomes.

 - Act as the Voice of the Customer and influence product and go-to-market priorities.

 - Build a culture of accountability, customer focus, and continuous improvement across the team.
   
   


WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

 - 8+ years of experience in Customer Success, Account Management, or Expansion leadership within B2B SaaS or transaction-based platforms.

 - Proven track record leading teams responsible for retention, expansion, and revenue growth.

 - Strong commercial mindset with experience managing usage-based or GMV-driven business models.

 - Executive presence with the ability to influence senior stakeholders internally and externally.

 - Highly data-driven with the ability to translate metrics into clear growth strategies.

 - Experience scaling teams and building operational frameworks in a high-growth environment.

Bonus: Experience in photography, creative services, marketplaces, or other service-driven verticals.




WHY YOU’LL LOVE LIFE AT GOTPHOTO

 - Work Where You’re Best: In the US, we are a remote-first organization that prioritizes impact over office hours. While our roots are international, we empower our US team to design a workspace that fuels their best work—whether that’s a home office, a local café, or wherever you find your focus. You bring the talent; we provide the flexibility. Wor

notes: GotPhoto is a sustainable and profitable business with a mix of tech and non-tech roles.
